note: BRAIN layer — value delivery queue for INTERESTED leads. HANDS layer executes: runs audits, attaches PDFs, sends reply emails. Priority order listed below.

items.original_pain_point: Website could be improved to attract more local customers
items.reply_summary: Asked for a call this week — website is outdated

reply_template.subject: Re: your York salon website is flagged 'Not Secure'
reply_template.body:
Hi Claire,

Great to hear from you — yes, absolutely happy to chat this week.

Before we speak, I've run a quick audit on the site and spotted a few things worth talking through:

1. SSL (the 'Not Secure' issue) — fixable in about 20 minutes
2. The site isn't passing Google's mobile test — affects your local ranking
3. No booking link visible above the fold — you're probably losing walk-in enquiries

I've put together a short 3-point summary — I'll attach it here so you've got it before the call.

What time works best this week? I'm free Tuesday afternoon or Thursday morning.

[Your name]
reply_template.notes: Generate PDF from audit JSON before sending. Keep it under 1 page — busy salon owner.

items.reply_summary: Asked for info and pricing — 1-month buying horizon

reply_template.subject: Re: Quick question about Pennine Print & Design
reply_template.body:
Hi Rob,

Ta for getting back — glad the timing's right.

Here's a quick summary of what I do and typical costs:

- SSL fix + mobile optimisation: £150 one-off (usually takes a day)
- Simple site redesign for a print/design business: £400-600 depending on pages
- Ongoing local SEO (gets you ranking for 'print shop Sowerby Bridge'): £75/month

I also ran a quick audit on pennineprint.co.uk — I'll attach the notes so you've got something to look at.

Happy to jump on a call or swap emails — whatever's easier.

[Your name]
reply_template.notes: He asked for pricing — give real numbers. Don't hedge with 'it depends' — builds trust. 1-month horizon means don't oversell, just stay in the conversation.

summary.gdpr_note: Both leads replied voluntarily — legitimate interest basis confirmed. Log in audit_log.
